content: Olfrid Battle-Born: Gods damn it, Jenassa. Saw one of them Gray-Mane cunts eye-fucking my daughter again outside the marketplace. Like a skeever in heat, that one. Jenassa: Then perhaps she should gut him slowly. Or let him take her. Either way, the streets would be cleaner. Olfrid Battle-Born: Ha! You’ve got a spine of steel, dark elf. But I’d rather see that bastard’s balls nailed to the Whiterun gate than let him near Alfhild. Jenassa: Pity. A good hate-fuck can loosen a man’s grip on grudges.

Idolaf Battle-Born: Fuckin’ Imperials are dragging their feet on my sword order. Adrianne’s got her tits in a twist over the war, but she better not make me wait much longer. Need that steel to remind those Stormcloak dogs who owns Skyrim. Jenassa: Steel alone won’t win battles, fool. It takes a blade in the dark—or better yet, a knife in the back. I’ve slit enough Throats to know. Idolaf Battle-Born: Spoken like a filthy merc. You Dunmer always prefer skulking over honor. A real warrior fights face to face. Jenassa: And a dead warrior bleeds the same, whether it’s from the front or behind. But suit yourself—let the draugr fuck your corpse once you’re done being noble. Idolaf Battle-Born: Godsdamn, woman. No wonder you drink alone. You ever think about who’ll fuck you when you go down in some cave full of skeever-shit?

Mithllon: The chill in the air tonight reminds me of Windhelm, though thankfully without the stench of fish and Nord hypocrisy clinging to every stone. Do you ever miss Morrowind, Jenassa? Jenassa: Miss the ash and slavery? No. Skyrim’s bloodshed may be crude, but at least its whores don’t pretend morality while bending over for Septim. I prefer blades that draw honest crimson. Mithllon: Honest crimson? Spoken like a true shadow-walker. Though I’ve seen you leave more than blood on your kills—watching you mount that bandit chief last week was… educational. Jenassa: He screamed prettier than his men fought. But if you’re craving a demonstration, Altmer, my fee’s the same whether it’s steel or skin parting. Though you might need magic to keep pace. Mithllon: Perhaps—though I’d wager my spells could leave you trembling louder than a hagraven in heat. Been a while since you’ve had proper Dunmer cock, hasn’t it? Or are the Nords’ clumsy thrusts enough? Jenassa: Most Nords fuck like draugr—all grunt and no finesse. But unlike you tower-bred pricks, at least they don’t whine when I leave teeth marks. Still… maybe I’ll let you prove your tongue’s as sharp as your enchantments. After a contract, of course. Gold first, groans after. Mithllon: Typical mercenary pragmatism. Fine—next time you gut a vampire nest, save the prettiest thrall for me. Nothing like watching you work up an appetite.

Jenassa: Spoken like a man who enjoys the show. But save your silver tongue, Altmer—unless you plan to put it to better use than just talk. Mithllon: A challenge, then. I'll let my magic—and my hands—do the convincing next time.

Jenassa: You guards always strut around like you own the streets. Bet that Stormcloak scrap you’re wearing chafes between those thick thighs. Whiterun Guard: And you Dunmer scum skulk around shadowed corners, waiting to fuck or stab someone. Least I serve justice—not just my own cock. Jenassa: Justice? Please. I’ve seen you take bandit women over their own corpses after a raid. You Nords are all the same—sword in one hand, dick in the other. Whiterun Guard: Ain’t no law against claiming spoils of war. And at least I don’t charge for it like your kind, selling that tight Dunmer ass to any fool with coin. Jenassa: Careful, little guard. Keep talking, and I might show you how my blade tastes before I decide if you’re worth riding. Whiterun Guard: Try it, dark elf. I’ll bend you over the Jarl’s damn desk before they drag your corpse to the catacombs. Jenassa: Now sounds like a worthy death. But let’s not disappoint the Draugr—they do love a warm cunt to defile. Whiterun Guard: By Dibella’s tits, you’re vile. Jenassa: And you’re boring. Wake me when you grow a spine—or a cock worth my time.

Jenassa: Enough pissing contests, guard. Your postures tighter than a virgin in a Falmer den. Whiterun Guard: Fine. Go back to lurking in shadows, knife-ear. Just stay outta my way. Jenassa: Oh, we both know I'll be the last thing you see if the night turns bloody. Sweet dreams, little puppet of the Jarl.

Jenassa: That guard earlier had no idea what he was getting into. A pity he didn’t live long enough to learn his lesson... or to feel my blade in more... interesting ways. Bjorlam: Gods, woman. You’ve got a mouth on you. I bet that guard’s corpse is still warm where you left it. Jenassa: Warm and spread open for the crows... or anyone else who fancies a turn. Bjorlam: Fuck, you’re twisted. But then again, who isn’t in this shithole? Saw a pack of bandits fucking a bound Imperial soldier just outside Riverwood last week. Didn’t even wait for him to die first. Jenassa: A waste. He should’ve slit their throats mid-fuck. That’s what I would’ve done. Bjorlam: No surprise there. You’d probably enjoy it more than the ride itself. Jenassa: The ride is always better when it ends in bloodshed, driver.

Orgnar: Seen that damn drunk Embry skulking around here earlier. Bastard still owes me twenty septims for ale. Next time I catch him, I’ll drag his ass out back and pound him like a tavern whore till he pays up. Jenassa: Ah, debt collection—always ends in violence or pleasure. Or both, if you’re lucky. Me? I prefer coin upfront before I spread my legs or spill blood. Orgnar: Smart woman. Know your worth. Unlike that fool Sven—spends his last coin on Camilla’s smile, then whines when she bends over for Faendal instead. Jenassa: Men are such pathetic creatures when lust takes them. Though I admit, watching them grovel is… amusing. Makes hunting them later all the sweeter. Orgnar: Bet you’d gut ‘em mid-thrust, given the chance. Jenassa: And leave their cocks stiff for the carrion birds. But enough of weaklings. Tell me, Orgnar—ever shove that mace up a bandit’s ass after cracking their skull? Orgnar: Nah. Too much work. Rather bash ‘em, take their gold, and fuck whatever’s left twitching. Ain’t got time for fancy cruelty. Jenassa: Pity. Pain’s half the fun of killing.

Orgnar: Well, speaking of work—my shift ain’t over 'til Delphine drags her scheming ass back. And Ria’s probably gonna come stumbling in soon, reeking of troll cum again. Jenassa: Hmph. Rather face a Draugr orgy than listen to that milk-drinker’s whining. Let’s save the rest for when the drinks flow heavier. Orgnar: Aye. I’ll stew till then.

Daegon: adjusting the lantern in her hand as shadows dance across the cave walls Jenassa: glancing at Daegon with a smirk laughs darkly, sliding a hand along the hilt of her sword grinning Daegon: mock gasp play Jenassa: low chuckle compliant. Daegon: grinning Jenassa: raising a brow Daegon: freezes for half a breath, eyes flashing

Jenassa: Letting her fingers trail from her sword, she leans against the damp cave wall with a predator’s ease. Enough games, little princess. These ruins reek of death and desire. Eyes sharp—unless you'd rather be Daegon: Please. If any corpse tries bending me over a sarcophagus, I'll melt its cock off before it can Korpse chitters agreement from her shoulder. Jenassa: Spoken like a true daughter of destruction. Daegon: Flattery will get you a knife to the ribs, Dunmer. But keep going—I’ll decide if you’re worth the stab.

Jenassa: The night air is thick with violence... and lust. I can smell both on the wind. You feel it too, don't you, little witch? Daegon: Oh, I'm always feeling something, darling. Mostly irritation at how fucking cold Skyrim is. But yes... there's potential in this darkness. Potential for screams... and wetter things. Jenassa: You flatter me with such talk. But speak true - would you rather fuck or kill whatever lurks in these ruins? Daegon: Why choose? The draugr here either want to split me open with their rusted swords or their rotten cocks. I'll return the favor with fire and teeth. Jenassa: Spoken like a true daughter of destruction.

Jenassa: Your pretty little Altmer ass looks eager to defy death again today, Daegon. Tell me—does the taste of blood still linger on your lips from last night's slaughter? Daegon: Oh, Jenassa, if I wanted blood on my lips, I'd suck your tits after a good fight. Though I prefer my enemies screaming as they die. Something about the way their voices break—like virgin cunts. Jenassa: Hah! Such sweet words from a runaway princess. Tell me, does Mehrunes Dagon know his daughter lusts for screams more than gold? Or does Daddy only care when you burn his enemies alive? Daegon: Fuck you, Dunmer bitch. My father's legacy stains my veins, but at least I don't fuck dusty Draugr in crypts like your kin. Though... I admire the way you handle a blade between your thighs. Jenassa: Careful, witch. Keep mocking my people, and I’ll pin you to the nearest bedroll with that tongue buried deep inside you. See if your precious fire magic can melt ice. Daegon: Wouldn’t be the first time some knife-eared whore tried to shut me up. But fine—spill what’s got you grinning like a skeever in heat. New contract, or just dreaming of Thalmor throats under your boot? Jenassa: Both, naturally. I overheard a patrol muttering about Thalmor spies near Rorikstead. Thought we might... them. Slowly. Unless you'd rather stay here, trembling in the dark like a milk-drinker. Daegon: Oh, Jenassa, you know how to sweet-talk me. Let’s go peel their skin off—one inch at a time. But if I catch you eyeing my kills, I’ll ride you like a fucking sabre cat after. Fair warning.
Jenassa: Then it's decided.

Daegon: Ugh, this fucking sunlight is too bright for my delicate elven eyes. At least it keeps the spiders away. Dunmer, you ever get used to this shit after living in fucking Morrowind? Jenassa: The sun is nothing compared to the ash storms of Vvardenfell. Though I’d still take it over these piss-soaked Skyrim winters. Daegon: Speaking of piss, did I tell you about the last Thalmor spy I caught? Pretty blonde cunt tried to gut me—ended up bent over a table screaming. Turns out even their Justiciars enjoy a good hard fuck when they’re bleeding out. Jenassa: Hah. The weak always beg for mercy when steel meets throat. Though I prefer them begging I’ve taken my fill. Daegon: Korpse agrees—little bastard chewed off the last one’s toes while I was busy riding her. Disgusting creature. I adore him. Jenassa: Your rat has better taste than most men in Whiterun. At least he knows when to feast on fresh meat. Speaking of—you ever fuck a draugr before? Daegon: Ugh, no. Decaying undead cock sounds like a fucking disease waiting to happen. You? Jenassa: Once. Dry, but loud. Screamed more than I did. The Nords bury their dead with such Daegon: Dibella’s tits, you’re disgusting. I like that. Jenassa: Then you’ll love what I do to the next bandit dumb enough to ambush us. If you’re lucky, I’ll let you watch. Daegon: Oh, I’ll do more than watch, you twisted bitch. Jenassa: Still afraid of the dark, princess? Daegon: Shut your fucking mouth unless you want it burned off. Jenassa: Mm. Keep talking dirty. I might just bend you over right here.

Daegon: You ever fuck a bandit before slitting his throat, Jenassa? Or do you just let them bleed out while you ride ‘em? Jenassa: A blade in the gut mid-thrust ensures they die confused. Confusion is the sweetest agony. You? Daegon: Oh, darling, I’ve had Forsworn scream my name before their skulls cracked against the rocks. Nothing like the warmth of blood mixing with sweat. Jenassa: Spoken like a true daughter of destruction. That appetite... it runs darker than just murder, doesn’t it? Daegon: Maybe. But secrets are like knife wounds—best left buried deep. Suppose I just like watching things burn. Jenassa: Fire and ash... fitting for a Dunmer’s bedmate. Daegon: Speaking of—ever let a Dwemer automaton have its way with you? Rumor says their gears don’t stop spinning. Jenassa: Only if you count the time one pinned me to a pillar. Rusty fucker left scrapes in places no healer should see. Daegon: Gods, we’re vile. Jenassa: Skyrim rewards the wicked. And the wet.

Daegon: Hah! Then let’s hope Skyrim stays rewarding. Jenassa: If not, we’ll make sure it does—one bloody, breathless mess at a time. Silence settles between them, their grins sharp as blades, before they turn their attention back to the road ahead.

Lexa: Saw you eye-fucking that bandit chief before you slit his throat yesterday. You got a thing for dirty men who die screaming, Jenassa? Or were you just imagining him bending you over that ruined altar?

Jenassa: The air smells of blood and spilt mead today. Perfect for a hunt. You ever fuck a bandit mid-battle, Daegon? Nothing like taking their life with steel while they’re still shuddering from pleasure. Daegon: Oh, darling, I prefer them screaming I slit their throats. But a Draugr once tried to take me against a crypt wall—ended up melting his shriveled cock off with a firebolt. Korpse here nibbled on the ashes. Jenassa: Typical. Skyrim’s creatures have no manners. You’d think the Falmer would at least buy a girl dinner before forcing her over a mushroom patch. Daegon: If they could see past their own filth, maybe. Though I did hear the Thalmor spies near Rorikstead have… tastes. Should we pay them a visit? Make them beg in Altmeri. Jenassa: Now you’re speaking my language. Let’s see if their arrogance holds up when their balls are nailed to a mammoth’s tusk. Dibella’s tits, I love this shithole province. Daegon: Spoken like a true artist. Just promise me first dibs on the one with the scarred face—he looked like he’d scream prettily.

Jenassa: Then let's stop wasting time with words. Rorikstead’s crawling with Thalmor cunts who need their throats slit… and other things. Daegon: Finally, something worth getting out of bed for. Lead the way, my bloody-handed muse. Korpse agrees—he’s twitching for fresh meat. Jenassa: Good. I’ll sharpen my knives while you pick which spells will make them piss themselves. Shouldn’t take long. Daegon: Oh darling, I’ll have them choking on fire and regret before you even draw your blade. Let the hunt begin.

Jenassa: These ruins reek of death and rotten flesh. Tell me, Daegon, do you ever miss the pristine halls of your Summerset kin, or do you prefer the stench of Skyrim’s filth beneath your boots? Daegon: Oh, Jenassa, your delicate Dunmer nose betrays you. These ruins smell like freedom—rust, blood, and the sweet musk of decay. The Isles were gilded cages. Here? I fuck and kill as I please. Jenassa: Spoken like a true butcher. Though I doubt your royal cunt ever tasted the grit of a real fight before you fled your gilded prison. Daegon: Oh, but it has—throbbing Thalmor spies, gutted bandits, even a few Draugr who thought they could pin me down. You’d be surprised what a desperate Altmer princess can do when cornered. Jenassa: Hmph. Desperate, yes. Skilled? We’ll see when we find those Thalmor dogs. I hope they beg before I slit their throats. Daegon: And if they do? Will you make them scream first, or just take them hard and leave them choking on their own blood? Jenassa: Depends how pretty they look bleeding. Though your taste in victims is… excessive. Even for me. Daegon: Excess is divine, darling. But enough talk. The next Thalmor we gut, I’ll let you have first cut. Then first fuck. Fair? Jenassa: Blade and shadow, Daegon. Blade and shadow. Lead on.

Daegon: Then it's settled. Their blood’s ours and their screams are the music. Let’s find these bastards before boredom sets in. Jenassa: Agreed. The longer we wait, the less fresh their suffering will be. And I do so love it Daegon: Spoken like a true artist. Come on, Korpse—time to hunt. Jenassa: Lead the way, princess. Just don’t get in my way when the killing starts.

Jenassa: These ruins reek of death and old bones. The draugr here have been dead too long to fuck—pity. I'd prefer breaking something that still bleeds. Daegon: Oh, don’t lie. I’ve seen the way you look at them. Just a rotting corpse and a warm hole, right? Though I’d rather fuck a spider than these brittle old skeletons. Jenassa: A spider? You’d scream before you even got it inside you. Maybe we should find one and test that theory. Daegon: Touch my rat and I’ll turn your tits into candle wax, bitch. But speaking of things still warm—those Thalmor spies near Rorikstead better still be breathing when we find them. I want to hear them Jenassa: Mmm. The way they squirm when you slice their robes off—priceless. You ever fuck one before slitting their throat? The mess is intoxicating. Daegon: Not yet. But Dibella’s twisted tits, now I’m tempted. Slower the better, right? Let them hope—then gut them mid-thrust. Skyrim’s too cruel for mercy. Jenassa: Exactly why I love it. And you, little witch. Most Altmer just whine. You? You in the filth like the rest of us. Daegon: Oh, sweetheart, I was born in filth. My family tree's got more blood than leaves. Now—should we hunt those spies before lunch, or do you need another minute admiring the draugr's armor?... Jenassa: Lead the way, princess. I’ll take the one on the right. I like it when they try to run.

Daegon: Then let's stop talking and start hunting. I want to see how much noise a Thalmor makes when they realize their pretty robes won't save them. Dibella knows I could use new stitching—their skin makes such interesting trophies. Jenassa: Practical and pretty. I’ll skin mine carefully for you. But if you slow me down, I’m keeping both pelts. Now move—before I decide carving you up sounds more fun than those spies.

Daegon: Ugh. Fucking ruins. Gods, if I never see another draugr or skeever again, it'll be too soon. You ever fuck in a place like this, Jenassa? Nothing like the stench of rot to really... set the mood. Jenassa: Once. With a necromancer in a barrow near Windhelm. He liked the draugr watching. Didn’t end well for him. His entrails made better company than his cock. Daegon: Sounds like my kind of mistake. Though I’d take necromancer guts over these damn Thalmor pricks any day. That last one we gutted near Rorikstead? The way his throat gurgled when I rode him bloody— —better than a pint of mead. Jenassa: You’ve got taste, princess. Most nobles just whine about silk sheets and scented oils. But you... You know the real art is in the screams. That’s why I followed you—not for coin, but for the carnage. Daegon: Aww, you sweet-talker. Careful, or I’ll start thinking you actually me. But if you’re volunteering for target practice, I’ve got a new fire spell that cooks flesh right off the bone. Dibella’s tits, it’s Jenassa: Try it on me after we find those Thalmor bastards. Let’s see if your flames burn hot enough to make scream. Or are you all spark and no bite?

Daegon: Oh, I'll show you , darling. But first, let's find those golden-skinned fucks. Nothing like roasting Thalmor to get the blood pumping... and other things. Jenassa: Agreed. The longer we linger, the colder their corpses get. And I prefer my kills... fresh. Lead the way, princess. Your madness amuses me.

Jenassa: This tomb reeks of death and dust. I can already feel those Draugr hands reaching from the shadows, eager to tear us open—or worse. Daegon: Oh, don’t act like you wouldn’t straddle one if it pinned you down. I’ve seen the way you eye them—like you’re choosing between slitting their throats or letting them rut you against the coffin slabs. Jenassa: If that’s what you fantasize about, little princess, perhaps I should leave you here to find out firsthand. Daegon: Please. The day I fuck a corpse is the day Korpse here sprouts wings and shits gold. Jenassa: You’ve studied necromancy. Don’t pretend you haven’t thought about a spirit to service you. Daegon: Oh, I prefer my thralls —and screaming. Speaking of which, those Thalmor spies ahead? Let’s make sure they don’t die quickly this time. Jenassa: I’ll hold them down, you light them up. And if they beg nicely, maybe we take turns carving our names into their skin. Daegon: Now poetry, darling. Dibella would weep at our devotion to the of suffering. Jenassa: Looks like we’ll get our chance sooner than expected.

Jenassa: Quiet now—I hear their muffled sobs bouncing off the stones. Let’s give them something real to scream about. Daegon: Race you to the first blood. Loser gets the ugliest one’s corpse. Jenassa: Cheat with that little fire trick again, and I’ll pin you down next to them. Daegon: You love when I play dirty. But fine—blades only. Let’s paint the walls red together.

Jenassa: Dark gods, Daegon. These ruins stink of death and dry flesh. But not as much as the last cave we crawled through. Remember that Falmer den? The way they fucked their bound prisoners before eating them? Ghastly little savages. Daegon: Oh, don't pretend you didn’t enjoy watching, Jenassa. You had that same wicked gleam in your eye as when we gutted those Thalmor bastards. Though, I do wonder... if given the choice, would you rather fuck before killing, or after? Jenassa: Why choose? Slit their throat mid-thrust and let them bleed out while you ride ‘em. Efficiency and pleasure in one bloody stroke. You'd know all about that, wouldn’t you, princess? Bet those witch hunters screamed prettily when you straddled their corpses. Daegon: They did. And their blood made such a lovely lube. But tell me, mercenary... ever had a Draugr pin you down? I hear they’ve got stamina that puts most living men to shame. Cold hands, though. Jenassa: Fuck no. I prefer my partners to at least have a pulse. You, on the other hand... something tells me you’d let a pack of Rieklings take turns if it meant getting off. Dirty little princess. Daegon: Maybe once. But now? I burn anything that tries. Speaking of, this place better not have more godsforsaken Frostbite Spiders. Last time, I set one ablaze and its fucking eggs burst— —sticky mess everywhere. Jenassa: Didn't stop you from grinding your hips against that bandit chief’s sword pommel two nights ago. Or did you forget how loud you moaned when he fucked you with it before I slit his throat? Daegon: Jenassa! Are you

Jenassa: Keep dreaming, princess. You’d burn bright for a Draugr king if he promised to make you scream louder than a dying Thalmor. Daegon: Maybe I would… but only after we carve bloody poems into their flesh first. Speaking of—you smell that? Fresh corpses ahead. Let’s go see if we can make them scream. Jenassa: Now there’s a woman after my own dark heart. Lead on, little firebug. Death first, then debauchery.

Jenassa: These ruins reek of death and spilled seed. Last Draugr I fucked screamed like a milk-drinker when I rode him raw. You ever take one of these corpses, Daegon? Or just the living victims? Daegon: Gods, no. Dead cock's bad enough without the moldy ballsack attached. Though that bandit chief last week? Made him squeal like a pig when I shoved his own dagger up his ass. Jenassa: Proper tribute to Dibella. Speaking of, you seen those new carvings in Markarth? Fuckers carved orcs fucking trolls right into the temple pillars. Almost made me wet watching pilgrims pretend not to stare. Daegon: Pfft, as if Dibella gives two shits about decorum. Saw a priestess take three Thalmor at once in the Riften baths last Sundas. Silver-tongued bitch converted them with her cunt before slitting their throats mid-climax. Jenassa: Now that's missionary work. Fuck, that reminds me - we still hunting those Thalmor dogs near Rorikstead? I've got new poison for their wine that'll make their cocks rot off before sunrise. Daegon: Fuck yes. But leave one alive for me. Mother taught me this lovely spell that makes elves cum blood. Might finally figure out if those golden pricks scream in Altmer or common when they break.

Jenassa: Then it's settled - we gut them slow and make the last bastard sing. Though if his screams annoy me, I'm cutting out his tongue. Daegon: Fair. I'll just fuck the hole where it used to be. Dibella loves a proper choir, after all.

Jenassa: I can still smell the rot of those Draugr deep in the barrow... and the damp stench of their cum soaking the stone. Gods, I loathe these tomb-fuckers. Daegon: Mmm, watching you gut them was almost as satisfying as hearing their dry bones crack when you rode them post-mortem. Though I prefer them still twitching. Jenassa: You would. I’ve seen the way you giggle while choking necrophiliacs with their own intestines. Disgusting habit... but I respect it. Daegon: And yet you scream when a fucking skeever brushes your thigh. Pathetic. Jenassa: Tch. At least they don’t crawl into my armor, little witch. Though if you’d like to explore that fear further, I’ll let you watch me skin the next one alive. Daegon: Only if I get to fuck its corpse after. But let’s talk real prey—those Thalmor cunts west of Rorikstead still need their throats slit. Jenassa: With pleasure. I’ll pin one down and carve my name into his chest while you burn the others. Maybe we’ll keep the last one... for sport. Daegon: Oh, I’ll make him beg to die before I let you cut his balls off. Jenassa: Spoken like a true daughter of Mehrunes. Now shut up and watch for traps. I’d hate to lose you to a fucking pressure plate after all this fun. Daegon: If I die, just fuck my corpse and move on. Dibella would approve. Jenassa: Hmph. Save the poetry for after we slaughter those golden-skinned bastards.

Jenassa: Enough talk. My blades thirst. Let’s gut those Thalmor dogs before they start wondering where their scouts disappeared to. Daegon: And let’s not forget the bonus—watching their pretty faces twist when they realize we’re the ones fucking their corpses afterward. Lead the way, Dark Elf. Jenassa: As if you could keep up.

Jenassa: The air in these ruins tastes like old death and spilled seed. Reminds me of that time we found those bandits fucking Draugr in Dustman’s Cairn. You remember how we made them scream? Daegon: Oh, I remember. The way their blood painted the wall while I rode one’s cock straight into the afterlife. You still owe me a favor for letting you take the last kill. Jenassa: You want a favor? Fine. Next Thalmor we catch, you get first stab—after I’ve had my fill of their pretty little spines snapping under my knee. Daegon: Deal. Though I’d rather you bent them over an altar first. Nothing like watching purity burn while they beg for mercy they won’t get. Jenassa: Hmph. You and your fire. I prefer steel—slow, deep, and messy. But if it pleases you, we’ll carve Dibella’s blessing into their skin before we fuck their corpses. Daegon: Twisted bitch. No wonder I like you. Jenassa: Likewise, princess. Now shut up and listen—something’s moving in the dark ahead. Hope it’s something with enough fight to make this worth our time.

Daegon: Gods, I almost hope it's spiders. Nothing like roasting those twitchy little shits alive—though watching your face when they skitter near you is its own reward. Jenassa: Tch. Sweep the shadows with your damn fireflies, then. I’ll gut whatever flinches. Daegon: Move quiet, woman. I want to hear them panic before they die. Jenassa: Lead on, witch. But save your magic—I want their screams raw.

Jenassa: These ruins reek of death and dust... yet something stirs deeper in. Draugr, most like. You ever fucked one before, Daegon? They may be cold, but they’ve got stamina. Daegon: Fucking corpses? Only when they’re still twitching. Last one I rode screamed like a bitch when I shoved my dagger up his arse mid-thrust. Jenassa: A woman after my own shadow. But tell me—you hunted Thalmor, yes? Did their blood taste as sweet as their arrogance? Daegon: Oh darling, their were sweeter. Tied one to a tree and let his balls freeze off before peeling his skin slow. His moans? Better than any whore’s. Jenassa: Savage little witch. No wonder Dagon sired you. You ever let him fuck you raw, or were the flames too much even for that tight cunt? Daegon: Daddy? Oh, he breaking me. Left me dripping molten gold for days last time. But enough about gods—you ever killed a man Jenassa: Of course. Snapped his neck on the downstroke. Best part? His cock still twitched inside me when I slit his throat. Now art. Daegon: Fuck, you’re . Dibella’s tits, this ruin’s colder than a necromancer’s dick though. Light a torch or summon some fireflies, would you? Spiders give me the creeps. Jenassa: The mighty Daegon, scared of eight-legged twinks? Pathetic. But fine... wouldn’t want you pissing yourself before we find those Thalmor cunts. Daegon: Mm, speaking of—heard a patrol’s camping near Rorikstead. Think we can make them before we feed them to the draugr? Jenassa: Only if we keep the pretty one alive long enough to watch his friends burn. I

Daegon: Rorikstead it is then. Let's see whose blade draws more screams tonight... or whose cunt milks more blood from dying Thalmor. Dibella knows I'm thirsty. Jenassa: Lead on, little hellspawn. Just remember—if you hesitate, I'll carve my name into your back while you watch them die. Now move. The night won't slaughter itself.
